identity.name: ScrapOS
identity.description: A high-density, high-contrast ERP designed for the rugged environment of scrap metal trading. It prioritizes data density, readability under harsh lighting, and speed of entry.

usage.labels: font-manrope text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-slate-500

primary.description: Slate-900. Used for Sidebar, Primary Actions, Headings.

secondary.description: Slate-100. Used for secondary buttons, backgrounds.

accent.description: Orange-500. Safety Orange. Used for CTAs, Alerts, Critical Statuses.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous but dense where needed. Use p-6 for containers, but p-2 for data table cells.

sidebar.behavior: Fixed left, dark theme always (Slate-900) to anchor the app.

buttons.style: Rectangular, no rounded corners or very subtle rounded-sm. Uppercase text for primary actions.

cards.style: Flat, 1px border (Slate-200), no shadow or very subtle shadow-sm. White background.

inputs.style: h-10 rounded-sm border-slate-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 focus:border-orange-500 bg-white
inputs.label_position: Top aligned, text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-500 mb-1.5

tables.style: Dense, border-collapse. Header: bg-slate-50 text-xs uppercase text-slate-500 font-bold. Row: hover:bg-slate-50/50 border-b border-slate-100.

status_badges.style: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise texture on the sidebar background to give it a 'cast iron' feel.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Grid Borders' strategy. Visible separators between dashboard widgets.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Use borders to define hierarchy instead of drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React. Stroke width 1.5px for elegance, 2px for active states.

login_background.usage: Full height on left side of login screen (50% width).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 for normal text. Use Slate-600+ on white.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible orange ring offset-2 on all interactive elements.
accessibility.aria: All icons must have aria-hidden or aria-label. Tables must have captions.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Do not build a generic SaaS. Build a tool. Think 'Bloomberg Terminal meets Construction Site'. Dense, fast, reliable.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard: Use the Bento Grid Mode B. Top row: 4 key metrics (Tonnage, Cash, Pending POs, Trucks in Yard). Middle: Main Chart (Tonnage vs Price). Right: Recent Activity Feed.
instructions_to_main_agent.weighbridge: Create a dedicated 'Kiosk Mode' view. Huge inputs for Weight. High contrast (Black on Yellow) for the weight display.
instructions_to_main_agent.tables: Implement server-side pagination and filtering UI immediately. These tables will hold thousands of records.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Group fields logically using Fieldsets with Legend styling (uppercase, bold, border-bottom).
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile: Hide the sidebar behind a hamburger menu. Stack the bento grid to single column.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly, mainly for sticky headers.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
